name: Bliss of Otherworld's Embrace
simple_desc: Inflicts the "Epiphany" state on all enemies. Increases the DMG taken by targets and has a chance to increase the number of stacks applied when stacking "Arcana". Additionally, "Arcana" stacks won't be halved after dealing DMG at the start of the next turn. Deals Wind DMG to all enemies.
desc:
Inflicts "Epiphany" state on all enemies for #2[i] turn(s). Then deals Wind DMG to all enemies equal to #1[i]% of Black Swan's ATK.
While in the "Epiphany" state, enemy targets take #3[i]% increased DMG. For every 1 stack of "Arcana inflicted," there is a #4[i]% fixed chance to additionally increase the number of "Arcana" stacked this time by 1. And "Arcana" stacks won't be halved after dealing DMG at the start of the turn.
